case_title: NICHOLAS KYU SEIN KYAUK VS. JESUS ANDIZADE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY AGUILAR JOSE---SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KYAUK, NICHOLAS KYU SEIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDIZADE, JESUS $3,129.78 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,129.78, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT OF $3,129.78 AS AMOUNT ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF BY THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,468.00 FILED BY KYAUK, NICHOLAS KYU SEIN AS TO DEFENDANT ANDIZADE, JESUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KYAUK, NICHOLAS KYU SEIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED) SERVED MAY-17-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDIZADE, JESUS
